title: jent scan --json output
description: JSON output produced by `jent scan --json [dir]`. Exit codes: 0 = clean or fixes applied, 1 = flags found.

files.description: Total number of code files scanned.

clean.description: Number of files with no issues.

filesWithIssues.description: Number of files that had at least one fix or flag.

totalFixes.description: Total number of fixable rule matches across all files.

totalFlags.description: Total number of flag rule matches across all files.

results.description: Per-file results. Only files with issues are included.

fixes.description: Names of rules that would fix this file.

rule.description: Name of the rule that raised the flag.

line.description: 1-based line number where the issue was found.
